(NYSE:PVH) was downgraded to 'Underperform' from 'Neutral' by Bank of America, which also lowered its price objective to $70 from $90, citing the apparel company's significant exposure to Europe, the Middle East and Africa (EMEA) and expectations that a recovery in the region could...

headline: BofA expects mid to outperform small stocks in the H2
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America has shifted its preference within small and mid-cap equities for the second half of 2026, moving to favor mid-caps over small-caps after the Russell 2000 surged 21% in the first half, the best performance of any size index.

headline: CSX (CSX) Stock Gets Fair Value Bump As Analysts Raise Targets On Volume Trends
summary: The analyst narrative around CSX is shifting as modeled fair value edges up to US$46.25 from US$45.89 and price targets cluster in the low US$50s. Recent research ties these higher targets to stronger carload trends, updated earnings estimates for 2026 and 2027, and an expanded US$5b buyback that some see as meaningful for EPS. Read on to see how these moving parts fit together and how to keep track of the evolving story around CSX. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story...

headline: People With $25 Million Are Doing This With Their Money Now
summary: Wondering what rich people are doing with their money and where they're investing?  A new Bank of America Private Bank study offers an inside look at the high net worth crowd.  When it comes to investing, wealthy Americans are going beyond plain vanilla portfolios, according to BofA's 2026 Study of Wealthy Americans.

headline: Bank of America (BAC) – Among the Top 10 Blue Chip Stocks with Growing Dividends
